shop.name: Kassaman Jewellery
shop.description: Authorship gold and silver accessories. Handmade jewellery crafted with precision and individuality.

philosophy.simplicity: We find charm in simplicity and give minimalism a distinct identity.
philosophy.elegance: The essence of refined elegance captured in a single piece.
philosophy.emotion: When you see a piece and instantly know — it is about Her.

anna.quote1: When a person becomes a muse, magic happens.
anna.quote2: For those who don’t choose roses.
anna.quote3: Blue like the ocean. Bold like you.

yerevan.quote: A city born of stone, yet alive with soul — where heritage meets modern form.

father.quote: A collection shaped by time and admired across generations.

sentiments.gifting: The most beautiful moments begin with this very box. Kassaman — the perfect surprise for your loved ones.
sentiments.gemstones: The tenderness of tourmaline set in a luxurious gold frame.
sentiments.selfExpression: For those who define their own rules.

slogans.rules: Those who define their own rules.
slogans.gift: Kassaman — the finest surprise for your loved ones.
slogans.progress: Always in Progress... Always in Style...

care.title: Care
care.metalText: Do not use chemical jewelry cleaners. Gently wipe this item with a soft cloth and remove any remaining impurities using mild, diluted soap and warm water. Avoid contact with abrasive surfaces.
care.gemstoneText: Use a soft cloth to gently wipe clean, then remove any remaining impurities with mild, diluted soap. Rinse with warm water and dry thoroughly before storing in the provided jewelry pouch.
care.serviceNote: Cleaning services are available at Kassaman Boutique:

gifting.title: Gift Box
gifting.giftingText: Each jewellery piece is carefully placed in our signature burgundy presentation box, accented with gold detailing and designed to protect and highlight every detail. Paired with our white branded gift bag and deep red ribbon handles, the packaging reflects a journey of craftsmanship, intention, and refinement—because every piece, like every story, is always in progress.

notFound.title: Sorry, we can't locate that page.
notFound.subtitle: Please check the URL and try again, or continue shopping.

hero.title: Elegance in Every Detail
hero.subtitle: Discover timeless fashion designed for modern confidence.

diamonds.title: Certified Natural Diamonds
diamonds.description: All diamonds are ethically sourced, from natural diamonds to Brazilian Imperial Topaz.

metals.title: Luxury Metals
metals.description: Crafted in 14K, 18K, and 22K gold, with white and rose gold options.

craftsmanship.title: Emotional Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: Each piece tells a story - inspired by Anna, Yerevan, and timeless elegance.

services.title: Free Resizing & Lifetime Cleaning
services.description: One free resizing within the first year and complimentary professional cleaning forever.

sustainability.title: Sustainably Sourced Gemstones
sustainability.description: From Colombian emeralds to London blue topaz - traceable and ethical.

timeless.title: Always in Progress, Always in Style
timeless.description: Timeless designs that transcend trends, made to be passed down.
